creator: bz@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to szubersk from comment #40)

Great, in that case the only thing to still try is the patch from comment #39 from today and you can ignore the comment #38.


Keep the 4G patch on top in any case.


Without it you may only be so blessed for a few operations but eventually it'll fail if it indeed starts;  if you are still running without it and it fails you can check what `sysctl compat.linuxkpi.lkpi_pci_nseg1_fail` says (is it 0 or not)?
